translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Adam, Seth, Enosh,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Cainan, Mahalaleel, Jared,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Enoch, Methushelah, Lemech,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Noah; Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, and Diphath, and Togarmah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Javan: Elishah and Tarshish, Kittim and Rodanim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Ham: Cush and Mizraim, Phut and Canaan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Cush: Seba and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raama, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah: Sheba and Dedan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Cush begot Nimrod: he began to be mighty on the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And Mizraim begot the Ludim, and the Anamim, and the Lehabim, and the Naphtuhim,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the Pathrusim, and the Casluhim out of whom came the Philistines, and the Caphtorim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And Canaan begot Zidon his firstborn, and Heth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Shem: Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And Arphaxad begot Shelah, and Shelah begot Eber.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg, for in his days was the earth divided; and his brother's name was Joktan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Joktan begot Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab: all these were sons of Joktan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Eber, Peleg, Reu,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Serug, Nahor, Terah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Abram: the same is Abraham.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Abraham: Isaac and Ishmael.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are their generations: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; and Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mishma and Dumah; Massa, Hadad, and Tema;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedmah: those are the sons of Ishmael.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Keturah, Abraham's concubine: she bore Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan: Sheba and Dedan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Midian: Ephah, and Epher, and Enoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were sons of Keturah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Abraham begot Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau and Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — The sons of Eliphaz: Teman and Omar, Zephi and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Seir: Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Lotan: Hori and Homam. And Lotan's sister, Timna.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — The sons of Shobal: Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi and Onam. — And the sons of Zibeon: Ajah and Anah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — The sons of Anah: Dishon. — And the sons of Dishon: Hamran, and Eshban, and Jithran, and Cheran.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, and Zaavan, [and] Jaakan. — The sons of Dishan: Uz and Aran.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before there reigned a king over the children of Israel: — Bela the son of Beor; and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Bela died; and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jobab died; and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Husham died; and Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the fields of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Hadad died; and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Samlah died; and Saul of Rehoboth on the river reigned in his stead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Saul died; and Baal-hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Baal-hanan died; and Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife's name was Mehetabel the daughter of Matred, daughter of Mezahab.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Hadad died. And the chiefs of Edom were: chief Timna, chief Aliah, chief Jetheth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: chief Oholibamah, chief Elah, chief Pinon,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: chief Kenaz, chief Teman, chief Mibzar,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: chief Magdiel, chief Iram. These were the chiefs of Edom.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi and Judah, Issachar and Zebulun,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Dan, Joseph and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad and Asher.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Judah: Er, and Onan, and Shelah: [which] three were born to him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, Judah's firstborn, was wicked in the sight of Jehovah; and he slew him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Tamar his daughter-in-law bore him Pherez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Pherez: Hezron and Hamul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Zerah: Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the accursed thing.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Ethan: Azariah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Hezron, who were born to him: Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ram begot Amminadab; and Amminadab begot Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Nahshon begot Salma, and Salma begot Boaz,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Boaz begot Obed, and Obed begot Jesse;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jesse begot his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimea the third,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Abigail bore Amasa; and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Caleb the son of Hezron had children by Azubah [his] wife, and by Jerioth: her sons are these: Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Azubah died, and Caleb took him Ephrath, and she bore him Hur.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Hur begot Uri, and Uri begot Bezaleel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And afterwards Hezron went to the daughter of Machir, the father of Gilead, and he took her when he was sixty years old; and she bore him Segub.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Segub begot Jair, who had twenty-three cities in the land of Gilead;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Geshur and Aram took the villages of Jair from them, with Kenath and its dependent towns, sixty cities. All these were sons of Machir the father of Gilead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And after the death of Hezron in Caleb-Ephratah, Abijah, Hezron's wife, bore him Ashhur, the father of Tekoa.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were: Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, of Ahijah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerahmeel, were Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Onam were Shammai and Jada. And the sons of Shammai: Nadab and Abishur.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail, and she bore him Ahban and Molid.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Nadab: Seled and Appaim; and Seled died without sons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Appaim: Jishi; and the sons of Jishi: Sheshan; and the sons of Sheshan: Ahlai.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jada, the brother of Shammai: Jether and Jonathan; and Jether died without sons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jonathan: Peleth and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Sheshan had no sons, but daughters; and Sheshan had an Egyptian servant, whose name was Jarha;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant as wife, and she bore him Attai.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Attai begot Nathan, and Nathan begot Zabad,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Zabad begot Ephlal, and Ephlal begot Obed,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Obed begot Jehu, and Jehu begot Azariah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Azariah begot Helez, and Helez begot Elasah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Elasah begot Sismai, and Sismai begot Shallum,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Shallum begot Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begot Elishama.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Hebron: Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Shema begot Raham, the father of Jorkeam. And Rekem begot Shammai;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the son of Shammai was Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ephah, Caleb's concubine, bore Haran, and Moza, and Gazez; and Haran begot Gazez.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jehdai: Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Maachah, Caleb's concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and she bore Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbena and the father of Gibea. And the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the sons of Caleb. The sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah: Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Salma the father of Bethlehem, Hareph the father of Beth-gader.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim had sons: Haroeh, Hazi-Hammenuhoth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the families of Kirjath-jearim were the Jithrites, and the Puthites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zoreathites and the Eshtaolites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Salma: Bethlehem, and the Netophathites. Atroth-Beth-Joab, and the Hazi-Hammana-hethites, the Zorites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the families of the scribes who dwelt at Jabez: the Tireathites, the Shimeathites, the Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hammath, the father of the house of Rechab.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the sons of David, who were born to him in Hebron: the firstborn, Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jizreelitess; the second, Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the third, Absalom the son of Maachah, daughter of Talmai king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the fifth, Shephatiah of Abital; the sixth, Ithream, of Eglah his wife:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: six were born to him in Hebron. And there he reigned seven years and six months. And in Jerusalem he reigned thirty-three years.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these were born to him in Jerusalem: Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath-shua the daughter of Ammiel;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ibhar, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: all were sons of David, besides the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Solomon's son was Rehoboam; Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Amon his son, Josiah his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Josiah: the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jeconiah: Assir; Salathiel his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazzar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Pedaiah were Zerubbabel and Shimei. And the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, [and] Jushab-hesed, five.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah and Isaiah; the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Shechaniah: Shemaiah; and the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, and Jigeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Neariah: Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Delaiah, and Anani, seven.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Judah: Pherez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begot Jahath; and Jahath begot Ahumai and Lahad. These are the families of the Zoreathites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these [were of] the father of Etam: Jizreel, and Jishma, and Jidbash; and the name of their sister was Hazlelponi;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah: these were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah, [and] father of Bethlehem.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And Ashhur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Naarah bore him Ahuzzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Ahashtari: these were the sons of Naarah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Helah: Zereth, and Zohar, and Ethnan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Koz begot Anub, and Hazzobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jabez was more honoured than his brethren; and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, Because I bore him with pain.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jabez called on theGod of Israel saying, Oh that thou wouldest richly bless me, and enlarge my border, and that thy hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep me from evil, that it may not grieve me! AndGod brought about what he had requested.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Chelub the brother of Shuah begot Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Eshton begot Bethrapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of the city of Nahash: these were the men of Rechah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Kenaz: Othniel and Seraiah; and the sons of Othniel: Hathath.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Meonothai begot Ophrah: and Seraiah begot Joab, the father of the valley of craftsmen; for they were craftsmen.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the sons of Elah, ...and Kenaz.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Jehalleleel: Ziph and Ziphah, Tiria and Asareel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Ezra: Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon; and she conceived [and bore] Miriam, and Shammai, and Jishbah the father of Eshtemoa.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his wife the Jewess bore Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah. And these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh whom Mered took.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of the wife of Hodijah, the sister of Naham: the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maachathite.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the sons of Shimon: Amnon and Rinnah, Ben-hanan and Tilon. — And the sons of Jishi: Zoheth and Ben-Zoheth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah: Er the father of Lechah, and Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of byssus-workers, of the house of Ashbea,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who ruled over Moab, and Jashubi-lehem. And these are ancient things.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These were the potters, and those that abode among plantations and enclosures: there they dwelt with the king for his work.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, [and] Saul;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters. And his brethren had not many sons; neither did all their family multiply like to the sons of Judah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they abode at Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-Shual,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and at Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susim, and at Beth-biri, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities until the reign of David.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their villages were Etam and Ain, Rimmon and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and all their villages that were round about these cities, as far as Baal. These were their habitations and their genealogical register.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Joel, and Jehu the son of Josibiah, the son of Seraiah, the son of Asiel,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Elioenai, and Jaakobah, and Jeshohaiah, and Asaiah, and Adiel, and Jesimiel, and Benaiah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: these mentioned by name were princes in their families; and their fathers' houses increased greatly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they went to the entrance of Gedor, as far as the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they found fat and good pasture, and a land widely extended and quiet and fertile, for they who had dwelt there formerly were of Ham.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these written by name came in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and smote their tents and the habitations that were found there, and destroyed them utterly unto this day, and dwelt in their stead; for there was pasture there for their flocks.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And five hundred men of them, of the sons of Simeon, went to mount Seir, having at their head Pelatiah, and Neariah, and Rephaiah, and Uzziel, the sons of Jishi,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they smote the rest of the Amalekites that had escaped; and they dwelt there unto this day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Reuben the firstborn of Israel (for he was the firstborn; but, inasmuch as he defiled his father's bed, his birthright was given to the sons of Joseph the son of Israel; but the genealogy is not registered according to the birthright,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for Judah prevailed among his brethren, and of him was the prince, but the birthright was Joseph's),

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — the sons of Reuben, the firstborn of Israel: Enoch and Phallu, Hezron and Carmi.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Joel: Shemaiah his son, Gog his son, Shimei his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Micah his son, Reaiah his son, Baal his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Beerah his son, whom Tilgath-Pilneser king of Assyria carried away captive: he was prince of the Reubenites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his brethren by their families, in the genealogical register of their generations, were: the chief, Jeiel, and Zechariah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Bela the son of Azaz, the son of Shema, the son of Joel, who dwelt in Aroer, as far as Nebo and Baal-meon;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and eastward he dwelt as far as the entrance to the wilderness from the river Euphrates; for their cattle were multiplied in the land of Gilead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And in the days of Saul they made war with the Hagarites, who fell by their hand; and they dwelt in their tents throughout the east side of Gilead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Gad dwelt over against them, in the land of Bashan, as far as Salcah:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Joel was the chief and Shapham the next, and Jaanai, and Shaphat in Bashan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their brethren according to their fathers' houses were Michael, and Meshullam, and Sheba, and Jorai, and Jaachan, and Zia, and Eber, seven.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — These were the sons of Abihail, the son of Huri, the son of Jaroah, the son of Gilead, the son of Michael, the son of Jeshishai, the son of Jahdo, the son of Buz:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ahi the son of Abdiel, the son of Guni, was chief of their fathers' house.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they dwelt in Gilead in Bashan, and in its towns, and in all the pasture-grounds of Sharon, as far as their limits.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All these were registered by genealogy in the days of Jotham king of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The children of Reuben and the Gadites and half the tribe of Manasseh, of valiant men, men who carried shield and sword, drawing the bow and skilful in war, were forty-four thousand seven hundred and sixty, able to go forth to war.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they made war with the Hagarites, with Jetur, and Naphish, and Nodab;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they were helped against them, and the Hagarites were delivered into their hand, and all that were with them; for they cried toGod in the battle, and he was intreated of them, because they put their trust in him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they took away their cattle: their camels fifty thousand, and two hundred and fifty thousand sheep, and two thousand asses, and a hundred thousand human souls.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For there fell down many slain, for the war was ofGod. And they dwelt in their stead until the captivity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of the half tribe of Manasseh dwelt in the land, from Bashan as far as Baal-Hermon and Senir, and mount Hermon; they were many.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these were the heads of their fathers' houses: Epher, and Jishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, heads of their fathers' houses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they transgressed against theGod of their fathers, and went a whoring after thegods of the peoples of the land, whomGod had destroyed before them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And theGod of Israel stirred up the spirit of Pul king of Assyria, and the spirit of Tilgath-Pilneser king of Assyria, and he carried them away, the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh, and brought them to Halah, and Habor, and Hara, and to the river Gozan, — unto this day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Kohath: Amram, Jizhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Amram: Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. And the sons of Aaron: Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Eleazar begot Phinehas; Phinehas begot Abishua,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Abishua begot Bukki, and Bukki begot Uzzi,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Uzzi begot Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begot Meraioth;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Meraioth begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Ahimaaz,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ahimaaz begot Azariah, and Azariah begot Johanan,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Johanan begot Azariah (he is it that exercised the priesthood in the house that Solomon built in Jerusalem);

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Azariah begot Amariah, and Amariah begot Ahitub,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ahitub begot Zadok, and Zadok begot Shallum,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Shallum begot Hilkijah, and Hilkijah begot Azariah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Azariah begot Seraiah, and Seraiah begot Jehozadak,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jehozadak went away, when Jehovah carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the names of the sons of Gershom: Libni and Shimei.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Kohath: Amram, and Jizhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. And these are the families of Levi according to their fathers.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of Gershom: Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeathrai his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Kohath: Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Saul his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Elkanah: Amasai and Ahimoth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Elkanah, — the sons of Elkanah: Zophai his son, and Nahath his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Samuel: the firstborn Vashni and Abijah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Merari: Mahli; Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzza his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Shimea his son, Haggijah his son, Asaiah his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of Jehovah after that the ark was in rest.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they ministered before the tabernacle of the tent of meeting with singing, until Solomon had built the house of Jehovah in Jerusalem; and they attended to their office according to their order.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are they that attended, and their sons: Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman the singer, the son of Joel, the son of Samuel,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Jizhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand: Asaph, the son of Berechiah, the son of Shimea,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchijah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their brethren the sons of Merari were on the left hand: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkijah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shemer,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their brethren the Levites were given for all the service of the tabernacle of the house ofGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of the burnt-offering, and on the altar of incense, for all the work of the most holy place, and to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant ofGod had commanded.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the sons of Aaron: Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are their dwelling-places according to their encampments, within their borders. For the sons of Aaron, of the family of the Kohathites, for theirs was the lot;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they gave them Hebron in the land of Judah, and its suburbs round about it;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but the fields of the city, and the hamlets thereof gave they to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to the children of Aaron they gave the city of refuge, Hebron; and Libnah and its suburbs, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Hilen and its suburbs, Debir and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ashan and its suburbs, and Beth-shemesh and its suburbs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and, out of the tribe of Benjamin, Geba and its suburbs, and Allemeth and its suburbs, and Anathoth and its suburbs: all their cities, thirteen cities, according to their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to the children of Kohath that remained [were given] by lot out of the families of the tribe [of Ephraim and of the tribe of Dan and] of the half tribe, half Manasseh, ten cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to the children of Gershom according to their families out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To the children of Merari [were given] by lot, according to their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites the cities and their suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities which were mentioned by name.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to the families of the children of Kohath who had the cities of their territory out of the tribe of Ephraim,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: they gave the city of refuge, Shechem and its suburbs in mount Ephraim; and Gezer and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jokmeam and its suburbs, and Beth-horon and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ajalon and its suburbs, and Gath-Rimmon and its suburbs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the half tribe of Manasseh: Aner and its suburbs, and Bileam and its suburbs, — for the families of the children of Kohath that remained.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To the children of Gershom [were given] out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh: Golan in Bashan and its suburbs, and Ashtaroth and its suburbs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Issachar: Kedesh and its suburbs, Dobrath and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Ramoth and its suburbs, and Anem and its suburbs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Asher: Mashal and its suburbs, and Abdon and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Hukok and its suburbs, and Rehob and its suburbs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Naphtali: Kedesh in Galilee and its suburbs, and Hammon and its suburbs, and Kirjathaim and its suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To the children of Merari that remained [were given] out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmono and its suburbs, [and] Tabor and its suburbs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and on the other side of the Jordan by Jericho, on the east side of the Jordan, out of the tribe of Reuben: Bezer in the wilderness and its suburbs, and Jahzah and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Kedemoth and its suburbs, and Mephaath and its suburbs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and out of the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead and its suburbs, and Mahanaim and its suburbs,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Heshbon and its suburbs, and Jaazer and its suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Issachar were Tola and Puah, Jashub and Shimron, four.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Tola: Uzzi, and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Jibsam, and Samuel, heads of their fathers' houses, of Tola, valiant men of might in their generations; their number in the days of David was twenty-two thousand six hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Uzzi: Jizrahiah; and the sons of Jizrahiah: Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, [and] Jishijah, five; all of them chief men.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And with them by their generations, according to their fathers' houses, were military bands for war, thirty-six thousand; for they had many wives and sons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar valiant men of might, registered by genealogy, in all eighty-seven thousand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [The sons of] Benjamin: Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Bela: Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of fathers' houses, mighty men of valour; and they were registered by their genealogy twenty-two thousand and thirty-four.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Becher: Zemirah, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jeremoth, and Abijah, and Anathoth, and Alemeth; all these were the sons of Becher.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they were registered by their genealogy by their generations, heads of their fathers' houses, mighty men of valour, twenty thousand two hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jediael: Bilhan; and the sons of Bilhan: Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tarshish, and Ahishahar.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All these were the sons of Jediael, by the heads of their fathers, mighty men of valour, seventeen thousand two hundred, fit for service for war.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Shuppim, and Huppim, the children of Ir. — Hushim: the sons of Aher.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Naphtali: Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Manasseh: Asriel, ...whom she bore; his Syrian concubine bore Machir the father of Gilead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Machir took a wife [the sister] of Huppim and Shuppim, and the name of their sister was Maachah. And the name of the second [son] was Zelophehad; and Zelophehad had daughters.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Maachah the wife of Machir bore a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his sister Moleketh bore Ishhod, and Abiezer, and Mahlah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Shemidah were Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah, and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eladah his son, and Tahath his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer, and Elad. And the men of Gath born in the land slew them, because they came down to take their cattle.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he went in to his wife; and she conceived, and bore a son; and he called his name Beriah, for [he was born] when calamity was in his house.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his daughter was Sheerah; and she built Beth-horon the nether, and the upper, and Uzzen-sheerah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his son was Rephah, and Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Laadan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Nun his son, Joshua his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their possession and dwelling-places were Bethel and its dependent villages, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer and its dependent villages, and Shechem and its dependent villages as far as to Gazah and its dependent villages.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And in the hands of the children of Manasseh, Beth-shean and its dependent villages, Taanach and its dependent villages, Megiddo and its dependent villages, Dor and its dependent villages. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Asher: Jimnah, and Jishvah, and Jishvi, and Beriah; Serah their sister.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Beriah: Heber, and Malchiel, who is the father of Birzavith.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Heber begot Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Japhlet: Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath; these are the sons of Japhlet.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Shemer: Ahi, and Rohgah, and Hubbah, and Aram.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of his brother Helem: Zophah, and Jimna, and Shelesh, and Amal.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Zophah: Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Jimrah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Jithran, and Beera.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Jether: Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Ulla: Arah, and Hanniel, and Rizia.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All these were the sons of Asher, heads of fathers' houses, choice men, mighty of valour, chiefs of the princes. And their number according to their genealogy, registered as fit for service for war, was twenty-six thousand men.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Benjamin begot Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Bela had sons: Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And these are the sons of Ehud (these were the chief fathers of the inhabitants of Geba; and they carried them away to Manahath;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: even Naaman, and Ahijah, and Gera; he removed them), and he begot Uzza and Ahihud.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Shaharaim begot [children] in the land of Moab after he had sent away Hushim and Baara his wives.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he begot of Hodesh his wife: Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jeuz, and Shobia, and Mirmah; these were his sons, chief fathers.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of Hushim he begot Abitub, and Elpaal.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Elpaal: Eber, and Misham, and Shemer, who built Ono, and Lod and its dependent villages;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Beriah, and Shema, who were chief fathers of the inhabitants of Ajalon; they drove away the inhabitants of Gath.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Zebadiah, and Arad, and Eder,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Michael, and Jishpah, and Joha were the sons of Beriah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hiski, and Heber,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jishmerai, and Jizliah, and Jobab were the sons of Elpaal.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath were the sons of Shimei.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jishpah, and Eber, and Eliel,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothijah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jiphdeiah, and Penuel were the sons of Shashak.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jaareshiah, and Elijah, and Zichri were the sons of Jeroham.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These were the chief fathers, according to their generations, principal men; these dwelt in Jerusalem.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; and his wife's name was Maachah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his son, the firstborn, was Abdon; and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zecher.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Mikloth begot Shimeah. And these also dwelt beside their brethren in Jerusalem, with their brethren.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-Baal; and Merib-Baal begot Micah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Micah: Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ahaz begot Jehoaddah; and Jehoaddah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Moza begot Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Azel had six sons, and these are their names: Azrikam, Bochru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan; all these were sons of Azel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Eshek his brother were Ulam his firstborn, Jeush the second, and Eliphelet the third.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers; and they had many sons, and sons' sons, a hundred and fifty. All these were of the sons of Benjamin.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And all Israel were registered by genealogy; and behold, they are written in the book of the kings of Israel. And Judah was carried away to Babylon because of their transgression.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the inhabitants that were first in their possessions in their cities were the Israelites, the priests, the Levites, and the Nethinim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And in Jerusalem dwelt of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin, and of the children of Ephraim, and Manasseh:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Uthai the son of Ammihud, the son of Omri, the son of Imri, the son of Bani, of the children of Pherez the son of Judah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the Shilonites: Asaiah the firstborn, and his sons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the sons of Zerah: Jeuel; and their brethren, six hundred and ninety.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the sons of Benjamin: Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Hodaviah, the son of Hassenuah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jibneiah the son of Jeroham, and Elah the son of Uzzi, the son of Michri, and Meshullam the son of Shephatiah, the son of Reuel, the son of Jibnijah;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty-six. All these men were chief fathers in their fathers' houses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the priests: Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Azariah the son of Hilkijah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house ofGod;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashhur, the son of Malchijah, and Masai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their brethren, heads of their fathers' houses, a thousand and seven hundred and sixty; able men for the work of the service of the house ofGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Bakbakkar, Heresh, and Galal; and Mattaniah the son of Micah, the son of Zichri, the son of Asaph;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Obadiah the son of Shemaiah, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun; and Berechiah the son of Asa, the son of Elkanah, who dwelt in the villages of the Netophathites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the doorkeepers: Shallum, and Akkub, and Talmon, and Ahiman, and their brethren; Shallum was the chief.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they have been hitherto in the king's gate eastward: they were the doorkeepers in the camps of the children of Levi.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Shallum the son of Kore, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah, and his brethren, of the house of his father, the Korahites, were over the work of the service, keepers of the thresholds of the tent, and their fathers, set over the camp of Jehovah, were keepers of the entrance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the ruler over them formerly; Jehovah was with him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Zechariah the son of Meshelemiah was doorkeeper at the entrance to the tent of meeting.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All these chosen to be doorkeepers at the thresholds were two hundred and twelve. These were registered by genealogy according to their villages: David and Samuel the seer had instituted them in their trust.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they and their sons were at the gates of the house of Jehovah, the house of the tent, to keep watch there.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: At the four quarters were the doorkeepers, toward the east, west, north, and south.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their brethren, in their villages, were to come after [every] seven days from time to time with them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For in their trust these four were the chief doorkeepers: they were Levites; and they were over the chambers and over the treasuries of the house ofGod;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for they stayed round about the house ofGod during the night, because the charge was upon them, and the opening thereof every morning [pertained] to them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And [part] of them had the charge of the instruments of service, for by number they brought them in and by number they brought them out.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [Part] of them also were appointed over the vessels, and over all the holy instruments, and over the fine flour, and the wine, and the oil, and the frankincense, and the spices.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And it was [some one] of the sons of the priests who compounded the ointment of the spices.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Mattithiah of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, was in trust over the things that were made in the pans.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And [some] of the sons of the Kohathites, their brethren, were over the loaves to be set in rows, to prepare them every sabbath.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these were the singers, chief fathers of the Levites, [who were] in the chambers free from service; for they were employed day and night.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the chief fathers of the Levites, heads according to their families; these dwelt in Jerusalem.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon, Jeiel, and his wife's name was Maachah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And his son, the firstborn, was Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Gedor, and Ahio, and Zechariah, and Mikloth;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Mikloth begot Shimeam. And they also dwelt beside their brethren in Jerusalem, with their brethren.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ner begot Kish; and Kish begot Saul; and Saul begot Jonathan, and Malchishua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the son of Jonathan was Merib-Baal; and Merib-Baal begot Micah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Micah: Pithon, and Melech, and Tahrea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Ahaz begot Jarah: and Jarah begot Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begot Moza;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Moza begot Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Azel had six sons, and these are their names: Azrikam, Bochru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan; these were the sons of Azel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines, and fell down slain on mount Gilboa.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the Philistines followed hard after Saul and after his sons; and the Philistines smote Jonathan, and Abinadab, and Malchi-shua, Saul's sons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the battle went sore against Saul, and the archers came up with him, and he was terrified by the archers.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then said Saul to his armour-bearer, Draw thy sword, and thrust me through with it; lest these uncircumcised come and abuse me. But his armour-bearer would not; for he was much afraid. So Saul took the sword and fell on it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when his armour-bearer saw that Saul was dead, he fell likewise on the sword, and died.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: So Saul died, and his three sons, and all his house died together.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when all the men of Israel that were in the valley saw that they fled, and that Saul and his sons were dead, they forsook their cities and fled; and the Philistines came and dwelt in them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And it came to pass the next day, that the Philistines came to strip the slain, and they found Saul and his sons fallen on mount Gilboa.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they stripped him, and took his head, and his armour, and sent [them] into the land of the Philistines round about, to announce the glad tidings to their idols, and to the people.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they put his armour in the house of theirgod, and fastened his head in the house of Dagon.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when all they of Jabesh-Gilead heard of all that the Philistines had done to Saul,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: all the valiant men arose, and took up the body of Saul and the bodies of his sons, and brought them to Jabesh, and buried their bones under the terebinth of Jabesh, and fasted seven days.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Saul died for his unfaithfulness which he committed against Jehovah, because of the word of Jehovah which he kept not, and also for having inquired of the spirit of Python, asking counsel of it;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and he asked not counsel of Jehovah; therefore he slew him, and transferred the kingdom to David the son of Jesse.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And all Israel assembled themselves to David to Hebron, saying, Behold, we are thy bone and thy flesh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Even aforetime, even when Saul was king, thou wast he that leddest out and broughtest in Israel; and Jehovah thyGod said to thee, Thou shalt feed my people Israel, and thou shalt be prince over my people Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And all the elders of Israel came to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before Jehovah; and they anointed David king over Israel according to the word of Jehovah through Samuel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, which is Jebus; where the Jebusites were, the inhabitants of the land.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David, Thou shalt not come in hither. But David took the stronghold of Zion, which is the city of David.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David said, Whoever smites the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain. And Joab the son of Zeruiah went first up, and was chief.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David dwelt in the stronghold; therefore they called it the city of David.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he built the city round about, even from the Millo round about; and Joab renewed the rest of the city.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David became continually greater; and Jehovah of hosts was with him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who shewed themselves valiant with him in his kingdom, with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of Jehovah concerning Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And this is the number of the mighty men whom David had: Jashobeam, the son of Hachmoni, the chief of the captains; he brandished his spear against three hundred, slain [by him] at one time.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And after him, Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite; he was one of the three mighty men.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He was with David at Pas-dammim, where the Philistines were gathered together to battle; and there was [there] a plot of ground full of barley; and the people had fled from before the Philistines.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they stood in the midst of the plot and delivered it, and smote the Philistines; and Jehovah wrought a great deliverance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And three of the thirty chiefs went down to the rock to David, to the cave of Adullam, when the army of the Philistines was encamped in the valley of Rephaim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David was then in the stronghold; and the Philistines' garrison was then at Bethlehem.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David longed, and said, Oh that one would give me to drink of the water of the well of Bethlehem, which is in the gate!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the three broke through the camp of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Bethlehem, which is in the gate, and took it, and brought it to David; David however would not drink of it, but poured it out to Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he said, MyGod forbid it me, that I should do this thing! should I drink the blood of these men [who went] at the risk of their lives? for at the risk of their lives they brought it. Therefore he would not drink it. These things did the three mighty men.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Abishai the brother of Joab, he was the chief of three; and he brandished his spear against three hundred and slew them; and he had a name among the three.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of the three he was more honourable than the two, and he was their captain; but he did not attain to the [first] three.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man, great in exploits, of Kabzeel: he it was that smote two lions of Moab; and he went down and smote a lion in the midst of a pit on a snowy day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He also smote the Egyptian, a man of stature, five cubits high: and in the Egyptian's hand was a spear like a weaver's beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian's hand, and slew him with his own spear.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and he had a name among the three mighty men.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, he was honoured above the thirty, but he did not attain to the [first] three. And David set him in his council.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the valiant men of the forces were: Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abiezer the Anathothite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Sibbechai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Maharai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ittai the son of Ribai of Gibeah of the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Bene-Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shage the Hararite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Hagri,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Berothite, the armour-bearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a captain of the Reubenites, and thirty with him;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hanan the son of Maachah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Uzzia the Ashtarothite, Shama and Jeiel the sons of Hotham the Aroerite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Eliel of Mahavim, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Jithmah the Moabite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Eliel, and Obed, and Jaasiel the Mezobaite.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now these are they that came to David to Ziklag, while he kept still close because of Saul the son of Kish; and they were among the mighty men who helped him in the conflict;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: armed with bows, using both the right hand and the left with stones and with arrows on the bow; [they were] of Saul's brethren of Benjamin:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the chief Ahiezer, and Joash, the sons of Shemaah the Gibeathite; and Jeziel, and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; and Berachah, and Jehu the Anathothite,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jishmaiah the Gibeonite, a mighty man among the thirty, and over the thirty; and Jeremiah, and Jahaziel, and Johanan, and Jozabad the Gederathite.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Eluzai, and Jerimoth, and Bealiah, and Shemariah, and Shephatiah the Haruphite;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Elkanah, and Jishijah, and Azareel, and Joezer, and Jashobeam, the Korahites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the Gadites, there separated themselves to David in the stronghold in the wilderness mighty men of valour, men fit for the service of war, armed with shield and spear; whose faces were [like] the faces of lions, and who were swift as the gazelles upon the mountains:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ezer the first, Obadiah the second, Eliab the third,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mishmannah the fourth, Jeremiah the fifth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Attai the sixth, Eliel the seventh,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Johanan the eighth, Elzabad the ninth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jeremiah the tenth, Machbannai the eleventh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These were of the sons of Gad, captains of the host: one of the least was over a hundred, and the greatest over a thousand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are they that went over Jordan in the first month, when it overflows all its banks, and they put to flight all [them] of the valleys, toward the east and toward the west.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And there came of the children of Benjamin and Judah to the stronghold to David.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David went out to meet them, and answered and said to them, If ye come peaceably to me to help me, my heart shall be knit unto you; but if to betray me to mine enemies, seeing there is no wrong in my hands, theGod of our fathers see [it] and rebuke [it].

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the Spirit came upon Amasai, the chief of the captains, [and he said,] Thine [are we], David, And with thee, thou son of Jesse: Peace, peace be to thee! And peace be to thy helpers! For thyGod helps thee. And David received them, and made them chiefs of bands.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And there fell some of Manasseh to David, when he came with the Philistines against Saul to battle: but they helped them not; for the lords of the Philistines upon deliberation sent him away, saying, He will fall to his master Saul at the peril of our heads.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: As he went away to Ziklag, there fell to him of Manasseh: Adnah, and Jozabad, and Jediael, and Michael, and Jozabad, and Elihu, and Zilthai, captains of the thousands that were of Manasseh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they helped David in his expeditions; for they were all mighty men of valour, and were captains in the host.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For day by day there came [men] to David to help him, until it was a great camp, like the camp ofGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And this is the number of the men equipped for military service, who came to David to Hebron, to transfer the kingdom of Saul to him, according to the word of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The children of Judah that bore shield and spear were six thousand eight hundred, equipped for military service.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of the children of Simeon, mighty men of valour for war, seven thousand one hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of the children of Levi four thousand six hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehoiada the prince of Aaron, and with him were three thousand seven hundred;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Zadok, a valiant young man, and his father's house two and twenty chief men.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the children of Benjamin, the brethren of Saul, three thousand; but hitherto the greater part of them had adhered to the house of Saul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the children of Ephraim twenty thousand eight hundred, mighty men of valour, men of name in their fathers' houses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the half tribe of Manasseh eighteen thousand, who were expressed by name, to come and make David king.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the children of Issachar, who had understanding of the times, to know what Israel ought to do, the heads of them were two hundred; and all their brethren were at their bidding.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of Zebulun, such as went forth in the host, armed for war with all weapons of war, fifty thousand, keeping rank without double heart.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of Naphtali a thousand captains, and with them thirty-seven thousand with shield and spear.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the Danites armed for war twenty-eight thousand six hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of Asher such as went forth in the host, to set themselves in battle array, forty thousand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And from the other side of the Jordan, of the Reubenites, and the Gadites, and of the half tribe of Manasseh, with all manner of weapons of war for battle, a hundred and twenty thousand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All of them men of war, keeping rank in battle array, came with a perfect heart to Hebron, to make David king over all Israel; and all the rest also of Israel were of one heart to make David king.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And there they were with David three days, eating and drinking; for their brethren had prepared for them;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and those too that were near them, as far as Issachar and Zebulun and Naphtali, brought food on asses, and on camels, and on mules, and on oxen; provisions of meal, fig-cakes and raisin-cakes, and wine and oil, and oxen and sheep, abundantly; for there was joy in Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David consulted with the captains of thousands and hundreds, with every prince.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David said to all the congregation of Israel, If it seem good to you, and it be of Jehovah ourGod, let us send abroad to our brethren everywhere, that are left in all the lands of Israel, and with them to the priests and Levites in their cities and suburbs, that they may gather themselves to us;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and let us bring again the ark of ourGod to us; for we inquired not of it in the days of Saul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And all the congregation said that they should do so; for the thing was right in the eyes of all the people.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David assembled all Israel from the Shihor of Egypt unto the entrance of Hamath, to bring the ark ofGod from Kirjath-jearim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David went up, and all Israel, to Baalah, to Kirjath-jearim, which belonged to Judah, to bring up from thence the ark ofGod, of Jehovah, who sitteth between the cherubim, whose name is placed [there].

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they carried the ark ofGod on a new cart out of the house of Abinadab; and Uzza and Ahio drove the cart.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David and all Israel played beforeGod with all their might, and with singing, and with harps, and with lutes, and with tambours, and with cymbals, and with trumpets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when they came to the threshing-floor of Chidon, Uzza put forth his hand to hold the ark; for the oxen had stumbled.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the anger of Jehovah was kindled against Uzza, and he smote him, because he had put forth his hand to the ark; and there he died beforeGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David was indignant; for Jehovah had made a breach upon Uzza; and he called that place Perez-Uzza to this day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David was afraid ofGod that day, saying, How shall I bring the ark ofGod to me?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David brought not the ark home unto himself into the city of David, but he carried it aside into the house of Obed-Edom the Gittite.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the ark ofGod remained with the family of Obed-Edom in his house three months. And Jehovah blessed the house of Obed-Edom, and all that he had.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David, and timber of cedars, with masons and carpenters, to build him a house.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And David perceived that Jehovah had established him king over Israel, for his kingdom was highly exalted, because of his people Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
